In India’s western state of Maharashtra, mango farmer Komal Walke is scrambling to meet orders from India’s online grocers after her family’s three acres of orchards produced almost no Alphonso mangoes this year. summary: The report also shows that in the first quarter, the share of repairable collision claims for battery electric vehicles (BEVs) held steady at 3.33% in the U.S. and 5.28% in Canada for the first quarter, according to Mitchell’s its Q1 2026 Plugged-In: EV Collision Insights report. Claims for mild hybrid electric vehicles surged to record highs in North America, with year-over-year increases of 25% in the U.S.
